history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column C, which is lava, so that is unsafe. To avoid lava and still progress toward the goal, I should turn downward first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe and moves me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. 
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. Moving forward to row 04 column B is safe, while the goal is to the right at row 04 column D. Advancing one step keeps me on a safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. Moving forward would hit the wall at row 05 column B, so I need to turn toward the goal. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell to the right is row 04 column C, which is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, but lava blocks the direct path, so I need to avoid stepping into C. The safe move is to turn upward and try to route around.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe and keeps me in a position to navigate around the lava toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. Moving forward would hit the wall at row 02 column B? Actually row 02 column B is open, so moving forward is safe, but it leads away from the goal. Since I need to get around the lava at row 04 column C and reach the goal at row 04 column D, I should continue upward to create space for a route.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. Moving forward would hit the wall at row 01 column B, so I cannot go ahead. To navigate toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn right to face east and look for a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell in front, row 02 column C, is lava, so I cannot move forward. The safe option is to turn downward so I can go around through the open cells below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead, row 03 column B, is safe, and moving there is the best way to continue around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe and keeps me moving toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, and the cell in front is a wall at row 05 column B, so I cannot continue forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, but row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move directly right. I need to turn around to head back up and find another safe route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left. The cell in front is a wall at row 04 column A, so I cannot move forward. To continue safely, I should turn upward to go back through the open path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left would face me toward column A, which is also blocked, while turning right would face me toward the open path at row 04 column C is lava, so I should turn around to face up and go back through the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left. The cell in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning clockwise would make me face up, which is the safe direction back toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
